settings.title: OUT OF BALANCE
settings.text: Antibiotics, birth control, stress, right underwear, even scented soaps... all wipe out the good bacteria your body needs to protect itself. The result? Odor. discharge, dryness, or repeated infections.

settings.title: THE RESET
settings.text: Restoring the right probiotic strains helps rebalance pH by supporting needed bacteria. As balance returns, odor fades, discharge normalizes, irritation eases, and flare-ups stop. Your body feels fresh again.

settings.title: THE DAILY SOLUTION
settings.text: One gummy delivering clinically studied probiotics, prebiotics and cranberry extract to support beneficial bacteria. Daily use helps keep your intimate microbiome resilient and balanced.

settings.heading: Science You Can Trust. Support You Can Feel.
settings.body: Our vaginal specific probiotic blend is crafted to support healthy flora, pH stability and long term comfort, using clean ingredients your body can rely on daily.

settings.title: Your Vagina Has A Natural Defense
settings.text: A slightly acidic pH and friendly bacteria keep odor causing microbes under control when everything is in balance.

settings.title: When pH Shifts, Odor Starts
settings.text: Hormones, antibiotics, stress and harsh soaps can raise pH and weaken that natural defense.

settings.title: Why Washing More Does Not Help
settings.text: Extra washing or scented products can irritate tissue and strip away helpful bacteria, which often makes odor worse.

settings.title: How Targeted Probiotics Help
settings.text: Vaginal specific probiotic strains support good bacteria so pH can rebalance and everyday freshness and comfort feels normal again.

settings.title: Candida Lives There Naturally
settings.text: Yeast is a normal part of the vaginal ecosystem and usually stays quiet when protective bacteria are strong.

settings.title: Flare Ups Begin With Imbalance
settings.text: Antibiotics, hormones, stress and tight clothing can disturb flora and give yeast or BV type bacteria room to grow.

settings.title: Why Usual Fixes Keep Failing
settings.text: Creams and pills calm symptoms for a while but they do not rebuild the bacteria that help prevent repeats.

settings.title: Why Targeted Probiotics Matter
settings.text: Most gummies use gut strains that stay in the digestive tract. Vaginal specific strains support the flora that defend against infections.

settings.title: Days 1-10
settings.subtitle: Rebuilding what antibiotics stripped away
settings.description: The protective Lactobacillus strains begin to colonize your vaginal and urinary microbiome, the same strains antibiotics wipe out. Many women notice subtle shifts first: less of that "something's about to start" feeling, slightly less urgency, fewer false alarms.

settings.title: Days 11-20
settings.subtitle: The cycle starts breaking
settings.description: Your microbiome grows stronger and more stable. The protective barrier that stops E. coli from climbing up the urinary tract is being rebuilt. Many women report fewer flare-ups, less post-sex anxiety, and a noticeable change in how their body feels day to day.

settings.title: Days 21-30
settings.subtitle: Full resilience. Life back.
settings.description: Your microbiome reaches a stable, Lactobacillus-dominant state, the way it should have been all along. For many women, this is the first time in months (or years) they go a full month without a UTI scare. Sex without dread. No urgent care visits. No bracing for the next round of antibiotics.

settings.title: 5 Billion CFU Active Probiotic Blend
settings.text: A high-potency dose of Bacillus coagulans delivering 5 billion colony-forming units to help populate and support a resilient intimate microbiome.

settings.title: Clinically Relevant Lactobacillus Strains
settings.text: Includes L. rhamnosus, L. reuteri, L. plantarum, L. acidophilus and L. paracasei at 50 million CFU each, supporting Lactobacillus dominance and healthy vaginal pH.

settings.title: Standardized Cranberry Extract (PACs)
settings.text: Cranberry extract standardized to active proanthocyanidins that help reduce bacterial adhesion to urinary walls, offering targeted support against recurring irritation.

settings.title: Prebiotic Inulin for Enhanced Colonization
settings.text: A selective prebiotic fiber that feeds beneficial bacteria, improving survival through the digestive tract and amplifying the effectiveness of every probiotic strain.

settings.heading: The Clinical-Grade Formula Behind Herdelica
settings.subheading: A precise blend of quantified probiotic strains, standardized cranberry PACs and supportive prebiotics built to nourish and stabilize the vaginal microbiome from within.

settings.heading: Loved by Women Everywhere
settings.text: Thousands of women trust Herdelica daily

settings.q: Are these actually for vaginal health?
settings.a: Yes. Herdelica is formulated with targeted lactobacillus strains selected for vaginal flora, not generic “gut health” strains. Most gummies on the market use one random probiotic that never reaches the areas women actually struggle with. We built this formula specifically for odor, discharge, pH balance and recurring discomfort.

Most women tolerate Herdelica very well. Some may experience mild bloating or digestive changes in the first few days as the body adjusts to the probiotics. This is normal and temporary.

Herdelica is gentle, non-hormonal and formulated with strains that are well studied for vaginal health.

settings.q: Can an oral probiotic really reach the vaginal microbiome?
settings.a: Yes. Research shows that certain lactobacillus strains can move through the digestive tract and colonize the vaginal environment. This only works if the strains are scientifically aligned with vaginal flora. That’s why strain selection is so important. Herdelica uses strains chosen specifically for intimate balance.

settings.q: I’ve tried everything. What makes this different?
settings.a:
The internet is full of women who tried it all: antifungals, antibiotics, boric acid, cotton underwear, unscented soaps, new detergents, eating yogurt, garlic pills and still kept ending up in the same cycle.

Herdelica targets the root cause: bacterial imbalance. Instead of masking symptoms or wiping out everything, it helps replenish the healthy bacteria your body needs for stability.

settings.q: Can this support recurring BV or yeast tendencies?
settings.a: Many women use vaginal probiotics for support with recurring BV or yeast symptoms. Herdelica isn’t a medication, but it supports the internal environment that makes recurring discomfort less likely. Women often report improvements within a few weeks of consistent use.

settings.q: How long does it take to notice a difference?
settings.a: Every body is unique, but most women report feeling fresher or more balanced within 2 to 4 weeks of daily use. That’s why we offer a 30-day difference guarantee. If you don’t notice a change, you can request a refund within that period.
Take Herdelica daily for 30 days. If you don’t notice a meaningful change in freshness, comfort or balance, contact us within that window and we’ll refund your purchase.

settings.question: Why It Works
settings.answer:
Recurrent UTIs almost always trace back to one root cause: a vaginal microbiome low in protective Lactobacillus.

Without those strains, E. coli travels from the gut to the urinary tract, again and again.

Herdelica delivers the clinically-studied probiotic strains your body needs to rebuild that protective barrier, supported by cranberry PACs and prebiotic inulin.

The result: a more resilient microbiome, fewer flare-ups, and a body that finally feels like it's on your side.

settings.question: What makes Herdelica different from other probiotic gummies?
settings.answer:
Most probiotic gummies use generic gut strains that never reach the vaginal microbiome, which is why they don’t help with odor, discharge or recurring BV and yeast flare-ups.

Herdelica is different. It’s formulated with scientifically backed, vaginal-specific probiotic strains shown to survive the digestive tract and support intimate flora and pH balance.

This means they actually reach the areas where women struggle most, helping promote fresher days, healthier flora and fewer recurring issues.

settings.question: Do I need to change my routine for Herdelica to work?
settings.answer:
No. Herdelica is designed to fit into your life without changing your daily routine.

You don’t need to switch detergents, avoid sex, stop using your favorite products or follow strict hygiene rules.

Just take your gummies consistently each day. The targeted, vaginal-specific probiotic strains do the work from the inside out by supporting healthy flora and a balanced pH.
